title: Validate split skill source model across packaging, execution-root, onboarding, and upgrade flows
description: Update and run the focused test suite covering packaged asset helpers, Codex skill source lookup, onboarding installs/scaffolds, and upgrade manifest behavior for the new split between `templates/skills/` and repo-root `.agents/skills/` exceptions.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover bundled asset helper expectations for `templates/skills/` and operator-only exceptions in `.agents/skills/`.
Tests verify `prepare_isolated_execution_root()` still places allowlisted Codex skills under the execution root skills directory while sourcing from the new split roots.
Targeted onboarding and upgrade tests pass with expectations updated from `.agents/skills/**` to `templates/skills/**` where appropriate.
